metadata.name: Invalid browser capture without scope declaration
metadata.description: This fixture must fail because the browser capture uses --capture-scope none while still attempting to capture. Capture mode 'none' means no capture is permitted; any capture step is a conformance violation.

steps.name: open-browser-session-no-scope
steps.run: sourceosctl workspace-ops browser-session open --operation-id op-bad-002 --capture-scope none

steps.name: bad-capture-without-scope
steps.run: sourceosctl workspace-ops web-capture take --session-id sess-bad-002 --url 'https://example.com' --format screenshot-png --capture-scope none
